name: Chicken with Feta and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 Cups Chicken Breast Halves Without Skin, Boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in 2 cups boiling water for 20 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, cut chicken into bite-sized cubes.
3. Combine flour with paprika and oregano to make a seasoning mix.
4. Dust the chicken cubes lightly with the flour mixture, reserving any remaining.
5. In a large deep skillet, melt half of the butter over medium heat.
6. Cook the chicken until it is lightly browned. Remove and set aside.
7. Add the remaining butter to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes.
8. Add chopped onions and garlic; cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
9. Sprinkle in the remaining flour, stirring to combine.
10. Cook for another minute, then stir in milk and bring to a boil.
11. Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer for 8-10 minutes.
12. Add diced tomatoes and sliced feta cheese; cook for an additional minute.
13. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
14. Serve the chicken over the cooked rice, garnished with olives.
